results.rendered_html: aticchatraḥ -trā,-cchatrakā [atikrāṃtaḥ chatraṃ tulyākāreṇa] A mushroom, anise, principally Anesum or Anethum Sowa; N. of another plant, Barleria Longifolia. (˚traḥ is said by  Amara  to be jalatṛṇabhedaḥ Mar. śetagavata; and ˚trā = śatapuṣpā Mar. śopa).
